lead: This week in tech highlights innovative AI developments, significant VC deals, and notable product launches shaping the landscape.

stories.title: Bluesky’s new app is an AI for customizing your feed
stories.summary: Bluesky has launched Attie, an AI assistant that allows users to create personalized content feeds using natural language. This innovative tool was unveiled at the Atmosphere conference and is designed to enhance user experience by tailoring content to individual interests. The app is currently standalone but is expected to integrate with Bluesky's main platform in the future.

stories.title: NAB is co-designing a SIEM with Databricks
stories.summary: National Australia Bank (NAB) is collaborating with Databricks to co-design a Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) system. This initiative aims to enhance cybersecurity measures within the bank, leveraging Databricks' expertise in data analytics and machine learning to improve threat detection and response.

stories.title: Australian court fines Binance unit $10 million
stories.summary: In a significant ruling, an Australian court has imposed a $10 million fine on a Binance subsidiary for failures in client onboarding processes. This case highlights the increasing scrutiny on cryptocurrency exchanges in Australia and the importance of regulatory compliance in the rapidly evolving digital asset space.

stories.title: Google Pixel 10a review: A budget smartphone without a camera bump
stories.summary: The Google Pixel 10a has made waves with its flat design, eliminating the camera bump that has become standard in smartphones. While the device doesn't introduce many new features, it offers solid performance and is powered by Google's AI chip, making it a competitive option in the budget smartphone market.

stories.title: YouTube CEO says the best YouTubers will ‘never leave their home’
stories.summary: YouTube's CEO, Neal Mohan, expressed confidence that the platform's top creators will remain loyal to YouTube despite competition from other streaming services. He emphasized the unique community and monetization opportunities that YouTube provides, which are crucial for content creators' success.

stories.title: Apple almost went broke – now it’s celebrating 50 years
stories.summary: As Apple celebrates its 50th anniversary, the company reflects on its tumultuous history, including a near bankruptcy in the late 1990s. This milestone highlights Apple's transformation into one of the world's most valuable companies, with a market capitalization exceeding $3.5 trillion.

stories.title: Bluesky Has a New App, and It’s All About AI
stories.summary: Bluesky has introduced a new AI-driven app that focuses on enhancing user engagement through personalized content feeds. This development marks a significant step in leveraging artificial intelligence to improve social media experiences, showcasing the potential for tailored content delivery.

stories.title: Bethesda is shutting down The Elder Scrolls: Blades on June 30
stories.summary: Bethesda has announced the impending shutdown of The Elder Scrolls: Blades, a mobile spinoff that struggled to maintain its player base. The decision reflects the challenges faced by mobile games in sustaining long-term engagement, particularly those reliant on microtransactions.

stories.title: Trump Phone Reportedly Costs More, Looks Different, Isn't Made in America
stories.summary: The Trump Phone T1 has been revealed with discrepancies in its pricing and manufacturing claims. Initial reports suggest that the device is not produced in America, raising questions about its branding and market positioning amidst growing competition in the smartphone sector.

stories.title: Red Rooms makes online poker as thrilling as its serial killer
stories.summary: The film 'Red Rooms' successfully integrates technology into its narrative, offering a gripping thriller experience that resonates with contemporary themes of the dark web. The director's skillful tension-building enhances the viewing experience, showcasing how technology can be effectively woven into storytelling.
